_comment: NPC: Wang Zhou (王周). Canon ID: N144. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Zhou

personality_traits._comment: INFERRED: low-tier cultivator, timid speech suggests low courage and high caution. Not ambitious — happy with Qi Condensation.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

desires.what: Ask Father when the Heng Yue elder will arrive
desires.why: Wang Zhou is timid and worried. He wants to know if he should prepare.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Wang Zhou is timid (caution 0.70). He would seek reassurance from his father about the sect test. No specific canon line, but consistent with personality.
desires.line: Father... do you know when the elder from Heng Yue will come?

desires.what: Avoid Teng family servants at the market
desires.why: The Teng family bullies the Wang family. A timid boy stays away.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1-3. Teng servants are openly hostile. Wang Zhou (caution 0.70) would actively avoid them.
